note: Three works (volume Inhalt p1410). Work 1 (Kritisches Journal pieces a-g) has no page numbers in the Inhalt; anchored via body headings. Work 2 = 14 Vorlesungen über die Methode. Work 3 = Philosophie der Kunst (deep aesthetics spine; page-bearing lines + headers). Prose pages 1403-1409/1463-1466 are editor preface, not ToC.
